comment.body:
> @topherbuckley regarding the SerialCommManager packet handling. I was planning to refactor the class in the next PR, so maybe it would be better if I implement these tests and according changes there?

I had a look through the remaining unresolved codex threads and I also have a question regarding scope in this PR. Are you aiming for all of "Phase 1" from the [Migration Guide](https://github.com/tekkura/sr-android/blob/InstrumentationTests/packetBuffer/docs/migrations/InstrumentationTests.md#phase-1-serial-command-abstraction--unit-testing)? It seems this includes the "PacketBuffer Abstraction" and "Logic Verification", but not the "Command Sealed Classes". Or am I misunderstanding something? 

Please clarify your intended scope for the PR and if you are splitting up Phase 1 into multiple PRs, the reasoning, then I can respond more accurately to each thread.
